prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次约 22760→24672→34541→33558→37306，整体呈明显后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 1.3 万名；2025 年基准约 37306 名，为近 5 年最高（最难进）；该校在山西省物理类/理科计划数：2021 年 105 人、2022 年 120 人、2023 年 115 人、2024 年 118 人、2025 年 116 人；2026 年计划 114 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招 2 人，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约 113–120 名（2026 年约第 114 名），排名稳定，属中游偏上水平；声誉文件未见内蒙古大学明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 101，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量偏低；投档异常数据中无该校断档记录，整体报考关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估中该校未进入前 200 名学校学科评估数据，A- 及以上学科较少；生物学、生态学、中国。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等 热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，对物理类考生吸引力强；山西省 2026 年物理类考生约 16.74 万人，较 2025 年（约 17.33 万人）减少约 5900 人（-3.4%），考生规模下降使竞争略有缓解；内蒙古大学位于呼和浩特，距山西较近，属邻省高校，对山西考生有一定地域吸 引力；该校在山西招生人数占其全国总招生比例约 5%–6%（2025 年约 73 人/5575 人），属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年小幅缩招（2 人）及本省物理类考生减少约 3.4%，缩招与考生减少效应部分对冲；在 2025 年基准 37306 名基础上，预计最低录取位次略前移（更易进），预测最低位次约 36720 名，区间 36220–37220 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 22760→24672→34541→33558→37306, showing a clear downward trend overall, with a cumulative drop of about 13,000 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 37306, the highest (most difficult to enter) in the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category/Science in Shanxi Province: 105 in 2021, 120 in 2022, 115 in 2023, 118 in 2024, 116 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 114, a slight reduction of 2 compared to 2025, slightly increasing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking in recent years is about 113–120 (about 114th in 2026), stable, at an upper-middle level; no obvious negative public opinion about Inner Mongolia University in reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking 101, rated as 'average', short video exposure is low; no record of score gaps in the university's admission anomaly data, overall attention is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university did not enter the top 200 schools' discipline evaluation data, with few A- or above disciplines; biology, ecology, Chinese.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province in 2026 is about 167,400, a decrease of about 5,900 (-3.4%) compared to 2025 (about 173,300), slightly easing competition due to the decline in candidate numbers; Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, relatively close to Shanxi, a neighboring province university, with some regional appeal to Shanxi candidates; the university's enrollment in Shanxi accounts for about 5%–6% of its total national enrollment (about 73/5575 in 2025), at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, a slight reduction in enrollment in 2026 (2 students), and a decrease of about 3.4% in local Physics Category candidates, the effects of enrollment reduction and candidate decrease partially offset each other; based on the 2025 baseline of 37306, the minimum admission ranking is expected to move slightly upward (easier to enter), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 36720, range 36220–37220.
